meta.title: CodeDrobe Logo Exploration v1
meta.anchor: A developer-first theme creation, management, and marketplace platform, starting with Codex.
meta.summary: Explore compact C monograms that suggest themes, layers, switching, and a digital wardrobe without literal fashion imagery.

preserve: Suitable for app icon, tray icon, favicon, installer, and website
Flat, simple geometry on a white inspection background
avoid: Literal clothing, mannequins, faces, or hangers
3D effects, mockups, gradients, shadows, and watermarks

routes.name: Wardrobe C
routes.strategy: Form a bold C from two offset sliding panels and a clean negative-space opening.

routes.name: Layered C
routes.strategy: Build a C from stacked theme cards to communicate themes, variants, and depth.

routes.name: Swap C
routes.strategy: Use two interlocking arcs to imply changing and activating a theme.

routes.name: Modular C
routes.strategy: Assemble a C from a small set of rounded modules for a creator-platform feel.

routes.name: Code C
routes.strategy: Combine a C silhouette with a subtle bracket or cursor notch without becoming a generic code icon.

routes.name: Icon C
routes.strategy: Create the simplest app-icon-first C with one distinctive theme-switch notch.

handoff.next_step: Select one route, redraw it as production SVG, and test at tray and favicon sizes.
